- Proposed implementation approach was discussed/approved in the issue: [ ] Yes [ ] N/A for small doc-only fix

- Out of scope:

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Manually verified dashboard behavior if UI-affecting
- [ ] Documentation-only change; code tests are not applicable

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are satisfied
- [ ] Relevant tests are included or explicitly not applicable
- [ ] Scanner-facing work uses or prepares for the normalized schema
- [ ] Errors, partial results, confidence, and limitations are visible where relevant
- [ ] Local-first behavior is preserved
- [ ] No telemetry or HarvestGuard-operated outbound service is added by default
- [ ] Documentation is updated
- [ ] README claims remain accurate
- [ ] PR is linked to the issue it resolves

## Privacy and Security

- [ ] No credentials, real secrets, raw sensitive data, or confidential target details are committed
- [ ] Reports or outputs do not include raw sensitive matched values
- [ ] Evidence and inference remain separate
